title: On the Optimum Secrecy Outage Probability and Ergodic Secrecy Rate over Wireless Channels
authors: Clément Leroy, Tarak Arbi, Benoit Geller, O. Rioul
abstract: We study the secrecy of wireless channels in the presence of an eavesdropper, where the channels are random and the transmitter only has knowledge of the channel statistics.
